creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, May 30, 2007 at 22:07:54 +0800, Charlie Root wrote:
> Fix with portlint tool. Thanks.

Tnanks very much!  But please let me be a little nitpicking. :-P

Could you launch portlint with "-abct" parameter?

"portlint -abct" will give more warnings, but many of them are easy to

solve.  I think this port is very close for committing. :)

-- 
Best Regards,
Li-Wen Hsu
